payload.message: Falcon channel message queued from Cedar Square cafe account.

effects.message: Falcon channel active. Watch desk awaiting tasking.

payload.message: First metadata pull indicates Falcon handset near airport service road.

effects.message: Analyst cell can verify metadata but will take time.

payload.message: Ambiguous scrape posted to Intercepts queue from unknown speaker.
Official schedule mismatch noted; residence prep still active.

effects.note: 08:09 watch desk note: residence motorcade prep still logged despite Falcon's cafe claim.

effects.message: Watch desk flags schedule mismatch. Need decision before transfer window.

payload.message: Logistics burst references gate A-17 and warns transfer window is tightening.

effects.message: Mobile team reports airport route closing soon.

payload.message: Transfer window closing warning from mobile team; dispatch authority required now.

best.summary: Airport team captures the real handoff thread. Falcon's compromise is confirmed and an HIA logistics lead is preserved.
best.operational_summary: Surveillance near the airport perimeter identified the courier handoff window and photographed the Local Official's security vehicle shadowing the exchange.
best.forward_hook: Counterintelligence section requests authority to run a controlled leak to map the HIA handler's downstream contacts.

partial.summary: Verification exposes the cafe report as bait, but response lag allows part of the handoff to slip.
partial.operational_summary: Analyst review established contradiction between HUMINT and phone metadata, but mobile team reached the airport after the primary package departed.
partial.forward_hook: Liaison branch proposes reviewing airport logistics manifests from the prior 72 hours for shell-company overlap.

failure.summary: Station commits to the cafe claim and misses the airport exchange, damaging credibility and exposing Falcon's channel.
failure.operational_summary: Cafe surveillance burned personnel time while rival intermediaries completed transfer at the airport perimeter without contest.
failure.forward_hook: Regional desk directs an immediate source-protection audit before any further Falcon-channel tasking.

defensive.summary: You avoid the trap by halting action, but lose initiative and return no actionable lead.
defensive.operational_summary: Station posture remained secure, yet both cafe and airport lanes went unexploited and the meeting network dispersed.
defensive.forward_hook: HQ requests a tighter rapid-response protocol so future contradictory reporting can be acted on without full stand-down.
